name: Ixia

passive.name: Siphon Starlium
passive.description: Ixia's Basic Attacks and skills apply a stack of (Starlium Charge) to enemies on hit. When Ixia performs a Basic Attack on an enemy with two stacks of (Starlium Charge), the attack will consume the stacks and be replaced with (Siphon Starlium), dealing ( +150% Total Physical Attack) (+20000% Lifesteal) plus (+10*Hero Level) (Physical Damage) to the target. Ixia recovers HP equal to the damage dealt by (Siphon Starlium) (only 20(+10000% Lifesteal)% against non-hero units). (Siphon Starlium) can trigger on all enemies in front of Ixia that are within her Basic Attack range, but it cannot Crit. Ixia's Basic Attacks cannot trigger Lifesteal.

skill1.name: Dual Beam
skill1.description: Ixia fires 2 Starlium-charged energy beams along the ground in the target direction, dealing 75( +80% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies in a rectangular area and slowing enemy heroes by 40%. Upon hitting an enemy hero, Ixia also gains 40% Movement Speed for 2s. Enemies hit by both beams will take double damage.

skill2.name: Star Helix
skill2.description: Ixia unleashes a canister of Starlium energy in the target direction, knocking back nearby enemies, and pulling enemies in range to the center line after a short delay and dealing 200( +60% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage).

ultimate.name: Full Barrage
ultimate.description: Ixia reassembles her weapon into 6 smaller weapons and enters the (Barrage) state for 4s. In this state, Ixia's Basic Attacks and skills can hit enemies in the large fan-shaped area in front of her but not outside it. Ixia's Basic Attacks can hit up to 6 enemy units (prioritizes heroes), and (Siphon Starlium) will fire simultaneously with her normal Basic Attacks.

mechanicNote: Ixia adalah marksman dengan DPS tinggi yang menjadi win condition utama di late game.
